pr.title: Match grInishie1_801FA9B4 to 100% by copying the same structure for StageData found in grHeal
pr.author: DavidWeaverAudio

summary: PR 2566 matched stage function grInishie1_801FA9B4 by adding grInishie1 stage data objects and reshaping the function to use the recovered data layout. The title says the approach copied the StageData structure found in grHeal. The bot report records one new function match for grInishie1_801FA9B4 from 94.03% to 100.00% and a .data improvement.

key_files.role: Only changed source file; added stage data arrays, a local StageData wrapper struct, resource/report strings, and updated grInishie1_801FA9B4 to use the recovered layout.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: additions grI1_803E48C8, grI1_803E4944, grInishie1_StageData, grI1_803E4950, grI1_803E49A8
raw_diff: grInishie1_801FA9B4 callback pointer and OSReport call changed

what_changed.text: Added s16 array grI1_803E48C8 containing a 22-element stage-related sequence and wired it into StageData as an S16Vec3 pointer.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grI1_803E4950 stage_data field casts grI1_803E48C8 to S16Vec3*

what_changed.text: Added grI1_803E4944 as the stage resource path string "/GrI1.dat".
Introduced typedef grInishie1_StageData containing StageData followed by report_fmt_get_gobj[0x24], then defined grI1_803E4950 with INISHIE1 metadata and an OSReport format string.
Changed grInishie1_801FA9B4 so cb is computed from the data block using (StageCallbacks*) ((char*) grI1_803E48C8 + 0x2c) + arg0 instead of directly indexing grI1_803E48F4.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added StageCallbacks* cb = (StageCallbacks*) ((char*) grI1_803E48C8 + 0x2c) + arg0

what_changed.text: Changed the failed Ground_GetStageGObj report path to load the format and filename from newly added data symbols.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed inline OSReport format and filename literals

what_changed.text: Automated report recorded grInishie1_801FA9B4 as a new 100% match and .data as improved.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment decomp-dev[bot]: grInishie1_801FA9B4 Before 94.03% After 100.00%

smart_moves.text: Used a matched sibling-stage layout as a hypothesis for recovering grInishie1 StageData, according to the PR title's reference to grHeal.
evidence_refs: PR title: copying the same structure for StageData found in grHeal

smart_moves.text: Recovered adjacent data around StageData instead of only editing the function body, which aligned both the function and part of the .data section per the bot report.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grInishie1_StageData embeds StageData plus report_fmt_get_gobj
text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment decomp-dev[bot]: function match and .data improvement

decomp_lessons.lesson: For stage files, a sibling stage's StageData layout can be useful evidence for reconstructing an unmatched stage's data cluster when the changed file shows analogous StageData fields and the verifier reports function/data improvement.
evidence_refs: PR title: Match grInishie1_801FA9B4 to 100% by copying the same structure for StageData found in grHeal

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a function's codegen depends on nearby static data layout, recovering the surrounding data cluster may be part of the code match, not a separate cosmetic cleanup.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: function cb access changed to offset from grI1_803E48C8
raw_diff: new StageData wrapper and report strings added
text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment decomp-dev[bot]: .data improved while function reached 100%

naming_conventions.name: grInishie1_StageData
naming_conventions.convention: A local wrapper type was named after the source file/stage and the embedded StageData role.

naming_conventions.name: report_fmt_get_gobj
naming_conventions.convention: A struct member was named for the OSReport format string used when Ground_GetStageGObj fails.

naming_conventions.name: gp
naming_conventions.convention: Existing local role naming uses gp for Ground* from gobj->user_data.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Recover a data block layout and access a later table through an offset from an earlier symbol when matching evidence indicates the compiler addressed data as one contiguous cluster.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: cb computed as (StageCallbacks*) ((char*) grI1_803E48C8 + 0x2c) + arg0
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: This is narrow PR evidence for this function/data cluster, not a general endorsement of raw pointer arithmetic when a typed field or canonical symbol is available.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Model following static data as a wrapper struct member when the function needs to reference a string located after StageData.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grInishie1_StageData contains StageData and report_fmt_get_gobj[0x24]
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: Global standards still require section ownership/data-layout evidence before promoting literals into named storage.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use automated objdiff/checkdiff-style report output to record exact match impact.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment decomp-dev[bot]: Matched code +236 bytes, one new match
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The slice only includes the bot report, not a full local build log.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Reported matched code 69.35% (+0.01%, +236 bytes), one new match for main/melee/gr/grinishie1 grInishie1_801FA9B4 from 94.03% to 100.00%, and .data improvement from 19.85% to 55.52%.

follow_up_queries: OSReport couldn't get gobj stage data

accepted_candidate_records.title: Sibling StageData layout helped match grInishie1_801FA9B4
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2566, grInishie1_801FA9B4 reached 100% after adding a grInishie1 StageData wrapper/data cluster; the PR title says the structure was copied from grHeal.

source_update_candidates.title: grinishie1.c contains stage data layout relevant to grInishie1_801FA9B4
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2566 changed src/melee/gr/grinishie1.c by adding grI1_803E48C8, grI1_803E4944, grInishie1_StageData, grI1_803E4950, and grI1_803E49A8, then used that data layout in grInishie1_801FA9B4. The bot report recorded grInishie1_801FA9B4 as a new 100% match.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path-specific historical fact for future grinishie1/stage data matching work.

source_update_candidates.title: Consider sibling stage data layouts as local evidence, but verify data ownership
source_update_candidates.text: This PR suggests that comparing a stage file against a matched sibling stage such as grHeal can reveal the StageData/data-cluster shape needed for a code match. Any broader standard should also preserve existing cautions about typed fields, string literals, and data-section ownership.
source_update_candidates.reason: Candidate refinement to existing infer-authored-source-style and data-section standards; not accepted here because the slice only shows one PR and does not include the grHeal comparison.

rejection_notes: Do not promote raw callback-table access via (char*) base + offset as a general standard; this PR only shows it was used in one successful match.
Do not infer that converting inline string literals to named data is generally preferred; current standards caution against string-literal symbol regressions without ownership evidence.
Do not claim human reviewer approval or intent; no human review comments are present in the slice.
Do not claim complete regression safety beyond the included bot report.
